member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext
member.summary: Entity Framework Core for the AI Clinical Scribe platform. Contains DbSet properties for providers, patients, encounters, note versions, note templates, ICD-10 codes, and audit logs.

member.name: M:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with the specified options.
member.param: The options to configure the context (provider, connection string, etc.).

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.Providers
member.summary: Gets or sets the providers/admins table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.Patients
member.summary: Gets or sets the patients table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.Encounters
member.summary: Gets or sets the encounters table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.NoteVersions
member.summary: Gets or sets the note versions table (append-only audit trail of saved notes).

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.NoteTemplates
member.summary: Gets or sets the note templates table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.Icd10Codes
member.summary: Gets or sets the embedded ICD-10 code reference table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Data.ClinicalScribeDbContext.AuditLogs
member.summary: Gets or sets the audit log table.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog
member.summary: Records an auditable action taken within the system, such as saving a note version, creating/editing a template, or activating/deactivating a provider. Stored in the database (never in memory or a flat file) to satisfy the audit trail requirement.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the audit log entry.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.EntityType
member.summary: The type of entity affected, e.g. "NoteVersion", "Provider", "NoteTemplate".

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.EntityId
member.summary: The identifier of the affected entity.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.Action
member.summary: A short description of the action performed, e.g. "Created", "Deactivated".

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.PerformedByProviderId
member.summary: The provider who performed the action.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.TimestampUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) the action occurred.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.Details
member.summary: Optional additional detail about the action.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.AuditLog.PerformedByProvider
member.summary: The provider who performed the action.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter
member.summary: Represents a single clinical encounter: the raw transcript/notes entered by a provider for a patient, along with the currently in-progress (unsaved) draft SOAP note text so the workspace can be restored across devices/sessions. Finalized, saved notes are recorded as immutable rows and are never overwritten here.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the encounter.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.PatientId
member.summary: The patient this encounter is for.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.ProviderId
member.summary: The provider who owns this encounter. Providers may only see their own encounters.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.NoteTemplateId
member.summary: The note template active for this encounter when generation last ran.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.TranscriptText
member.summary: The raw transcript or freeform clinical observations entered by the provider.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.DraftNoteText
member.summary: The most recently generated/edited SOAP note text that has not yet been saved as a new . Persisted continuously so an in-progress draft can be restored after a refresh, browser close, or login from a different device.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.Status
member.summary: Whether this encounter currently has an unsaved draft or has been saved at least once.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) the encounter was started.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) the encounter (including its draft) was last modified.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.Patient
member.summary: The patient this encounter belongs to.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.Provider
member.summary: The provider who owns this encounter.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.NoteTemplate
member.summary: The note template active for this encounter, if any.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Encounter.NoteVersions
member.summary: The append-only history of saved note versions for this encounter.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.EncounterStatus
member.summary: The lifecycle status of an encounter's current in-progress note.

member.name: F:Hospital_AI.Models.EncounterStatus.Draft
member.summary: The provider has entered a transcript/notes but has not saved a final note yet.

member.name: F:Hospital_AI.Models.EncounterStatus.Saved
member.summary: The provider has saved at least one finalized note version for this encounter.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.Icd10Code
member.summary: Represents a single embedded ICD-10 diagnosis code entry used to power the standalone ICD-10 search widget. A subset (200-300 entries) is seeded at startup; no external ICD-10 API is used at runtime.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Icd10Code.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the code entry.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Icd10Code.Code
member.summary: The ICD-10 code, e.g. "J45.909".

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Icd10Code.Description
member.summary: The human-readable description of the diagnosis, e.g. "Unspecified asthma, uncomplicated".

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate
member.summary: Represents an admin-managed note template: a structured prompt that shapes how the AI generates SOAP notes for a specific encounter type (e.g. orthopedic follow-up, new patient evaluation, urgent care visit). Providers select a template before generating a note. Updates take effect immediately for any provider currently generating notes.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the template.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.Name
member.summary: The display name of the template (e.g. "Orthopedic Follow-up").

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.PromptText
member.summary: The prompt text/instructions injected into the AI system message to shape note generation for this encounter type.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this template is available for providers to select.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) this template was created.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) this template was last updated. Providers poll/re-check this value so an in-progress generation picks up admin edits without a page refresh.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteTemplate.Encounters
member.summary: Encounters that used this template.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion
member.summary: Represents one immutable, saved version of a SOAP note for an encounter. Every save creates a new row; prior versions are never overwritten or deleted, providing a full audit trail of who saved each version and when.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of this note version.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.EncounterId
member.summary: The encounter this note version belongs to.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.VersionNumber
member.summary: The 1-based, monotonically increasing version number for this encounter.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Subjective
member.summary: The Subjective section of the SOAP note.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Objective
member.summary: The Objective section of the SOAP note.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Assessment
member.summary: The Assessment section of the SOAP note, including suggested ICD-10 codes.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Plan
member.summary: The Plan section of the SOAP note.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.SavedByProviderId
member.summary: The provider who saved this version.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.SavedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) this version was saved.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.Encounter
member.summary: The encounter this note version belongs to.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.NoteVersion.SavedByProvider
member.summary: The provider who saved this version.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient
member.summary: Represents a patient identified by first name, last name, and date of birth. Patients are matched across encounters using this triplet so that prior history can be retrieved and injected as AI context for returning patients.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the patient.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.FirstName
member.summary: The patient's first name.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.LastName
member.summary: The patient's last name.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.DateOfBirth
member.summary: The patient's date of birth.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) this patient record was first created.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Patient.Encounters
member.summary: All encounters recorded for this patient, across all providers.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider
member.summary: Represents a clinical staff account (Provider or Admin) authenticated via Entra External ID. Hard-coded demo accounts are seeded at startup; role is resolved by matching the signed-in user's email against this table.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the provider account.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.Name
member.summary: The provider's display name.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.Email
member.summary: The email address used to sign in via Entra External ID. Used to resolve the authenticated user to this provider record.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.Role
member.summary: The role assigned to this account (Provider or Admin).

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the account is currently active. Deactivated providers cannot start new encounters, but their historical data is preserved.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: The date and time (UTC) the account was created.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.Encounters
member.summary: Encounters authored by this provider.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Models.Provider.SavedNoteVersions
member.summary: Note versions saved by this provider.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Models.ProviderRole
member.summary: The role assigned to an authenticated user of the Clinical Scribe platform.

member.name: F:Hospital_AI.Models.ProviderRole.Provider
member.summary: A clinician who documents encounters and can only see their own data.

member.name: F:Hospital_AI.Models.ProviderRole.Admin
member.summary: An administrator who manages providers, templates, and can view all encounters.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Pages.IndexModel
member.summary: The public welcome page. Unauthenticated users see a description of the application and a sign-in link; authenticated users see a greeting and a link into their workspace.

member.name: M:Hospital_AI.Pages.IndexModel.OnGet
member.summary: Handles GET requests to the welcome page.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Program
member.summary: Configures and starts the AI Clinical Scribe ASP.NET Core Web API application, registering all required services (AI, database, Swagger) and running the HTTP request pipeline.

member.name: M:Hospital_AI.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.name: M:Hospital_AI.Program.RegisterOpenAIClient(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplicationBuilder,System.Uri,Azure.AzureKeyCredential,System.String)
member.summary: Registers the OpenAI client with the specified parameters.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.GlobalSettings
member.summary: Provides global settings for the application.

member.name: F:Hospital_AI.GlobalSettings.ServerStartDateTime
member.summary: The date and time when the server was started.

member.name: T:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for the Azure OpenAI service used by the NoteKeeper API. Bound from the "AISettings" section of appsettings.json.

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.DeploymentUri
member.summary: Gets or sets the Azure OpenAI deployment endpoint URI

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.ApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the API key for authenticating with Azure OpenAI service

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.DeploymentModelName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the deployed model to use for chat completions

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.Temperature
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling temperature (0.0 to 2.0). Higher values make output more random, lower values make it more deterministic

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.TopP
member.summary: Gets or sets the nucleus sampling parameter (0.0 to 1.0). Controls diversity via nucleus sampling

member.name: P:Hospital_AI.Settings.AISettings.MaxOutputTokens
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
